affected_locations.label: source
affected_locations.detail: Authenticated owner update route to own profile row when column grants allow it.

preconditions: Attacker has a normal authenticated account
Effective grants allow authenticated writes to privileged profile columns
steps: Update own profile entitlement columns through Supabase REST/SDK
Trigger code paths that call resolveProAccess() or has_pro_access()
Receive Pro-gated behavior for the attacker's account
notes: These are discovery support facts only; the top-level attack-path phase was not run.
